debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
X : Set α
hX : Maximal (fun X => @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G - X.encard) X
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = (G.vertexSet \ X).encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - X))

failed_attempts:
let H := G - X
  have h_iness : ∀ v, H.inessential v := by
    intro v
    if hv : v ∈ V(H) then
      have : ν(H - v) = ν(H) := by
        by_contra hne
        have : ν(G - (X.insert v)) = ν(G) - (X.insert v).encard := by sorry
        exact hX.not_prop_of_gt (subset_insert _ _) (ne_insert_of_not_mem (by simpa using hv)) this
      exact sorry -- inessential_of_nu_eq
    else exact inessential_of_not_mem hv
  obtain ⟨M, hM, h_miss⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  have h_M_max : H.IsMaxMatching M := sorry
  rw [← h_M_max.encard]
  -- Logic: 2 * |M| = |V(M)| = |V(H)| - |Missed| = |V(H)| - |OddComponents|
  sorry
